$comment: Curated 'use when' notes for SECTIONS.md, keyed by section _type (landing/home system) and blog block _type. gen-catalog.mjs merges this with everything it derives from code. A type missing here shows up in the catalog flagged 'meta missing' so it cannot silently go undocumented.

sections.hero: Landing page opener. One H1 per page lives here. Use on every landing and profile page.
sections.splitHero: Home-style split hero with image and product framing. Use when the page opens on a visual product story instead of a plain headline.
sections.problem: Names the ground-condition problem before selling anything. Use early on application pages, right after the hero.
sections.solution: Answers the problem block with the fabric match. Always pair after problem.
sections.statementBand: One short bold claim on a full-width band. Use as a breather between dense sections, max once per page.
sections.bigTypeFeatures: Large-type feature list. Use when 3-4 product properties deserve headline treatment instead of a table.
sections.dualBenefit: Two side-by-side benefit panels. Use when exactly two outcomes matter, e.g. weed control plus water flow.
sections.useCaseGrid: Grid of applications a fabric serves. Use to route readers to their own use case.
sections.groundConditionCards: The three-product chooser by ground condition. Use when the page must explain SHIELD vs XBAR vs TERRA selection.
sections.specSheet: Technical spec table for one product. Use on product-focused pages for contractors who buy on numbers.
sections.sizeSelector: Roll size and coverage picker. Use near the end of product pages, before the CTA.
sections.productComparison: Two or three products compared on shared attributes. Use on comparison and vs pages.
sections.fabricMatrix: Full three-fabric comparison matrix. Use when the whole line needs comparing, not just two products.
sections.calculatorEmbed: Embeds the Fabric Calculator. Use on pages where the next step is sizing a job.
sections.faq: 2-6 question accordion. Use on every landing page; feeds FAQPage JSON-LD.
sections.reviews: Customer review cards. Use as social proof after the product case is made.
sections.testimonials: Quote-led testimonials. Use when the proof is a person's words rather than a star rating.
sections.quoteBand: Single large customer quote on a band. Use for one standout quote, max once per page.
sections.projectSpotlight: One real job told as a story. Use on application and profile pages with strong photos.
sections.realJobs: Grid of real installation jobs. Use when several jobs prove the application at a glance.
sections.jobGallery: Photo gallery of installs. Use when images carry the proof and captions can stay short.
sections.applicationGallery: Application photo cards with labels. Use to show breadth of where a fabric works.
sections.installShowcase: Installation walkthrough with imagery. Use when showing the install builds buying confidence.
sections.editorialCards: Cards linking to blog guides. Use to route landing traffic into the content hub.
sections.featuredGuide: One highlighted guide with cover art. Use when a single guide is the natural next read.
sections.videoFeature: Single video with supporting copy. Use when footage explains the fabric better than stills.
sections.homeVideoFeature: Home-style video feature variant. Use on home-like layouts; prefer videoFeature elsewhere.
sections.homeStatStrip: Row of proof numbers. Use to compress credibility into one line, e.g. jobs covered, states shipped.
sections.steps: Numbered how-to steps. Use for install or prep sequences of 3-7 steps.
sections.callout: Emphasized note or warning box. Use sparingly for the one thing readers must not miss.
sections.internalLinks: Related links block. Use near the page end to route to products, tools, and guides.
sections.toolsBand: Band promoting the site tools: Calculator, Finder Quiz, Comparison Engine. Use once, mid or late page.
sections.cta: Closing call to action with approved labels only. Every landing page ends with one.
sections.instagramFeed: Live Instagram embed, third-party script (isAction). Home only; confirm before any new surface.

blogBlocks.prose: Body copy with optional H2 heading. The default block; posts open with it.
blogBlocks.image: Inline image with required alt and optional caption. Source from DOTDAY Drive assets.
blogBlocks.comparisonTable: Compact comparison table. Use for weight, product, or method comparisons inside a post.
blogBlocks.steps: Numbered instructions inside a post. Use for install and how-to sequences.
blogBlocks.proTip: Highlighted practical tip. Use once or twice per post, never stacked.
blogBlocks.warning: Caution block for mistakes that cost money or a redo. Use only when a real failure mode exists.
blogBlocks.statStrip: Row of numeric proof points inside a post.
blogBlocks.trustStrip: Compact credibility strip. Use in buying guides where trust needs an early anchor.
blogBlocks.cta: Inline call to action, approved labels only. Every post ends with one.
